titleStmt.title: SII 23.212: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 212. (A.R. No. 212 of 1907.) Tiruviḍaimarudūr, Kumbhakonam Taluk, Tanjavur District Mahāliṅgasvāmi temple—on the same wall

summary.p: The beginning of this inscription is lost and hence it cannot be definitely assigned to any king. The writing is of about the 10th century A.D. The object of the record is the setting up of an image of Naṭarāja (Āḍalviḍaṅgadēvar) in the temple by one Śrī Kāryam Iṅgaṇāṭṭu-Pallavaraiyar, who is also stated to have presented several gold ornaments to the deity. It registers also a contribution in money made by a Kavarai Śeṭṭi resident of Tirunāraṇachchēri (quarter) by name Tirunāvukkaraiyaṉ, for digging a tank. The Sabhā of Tiraimur consisting of 300 members, the Nagarattār of 400 members and other unspecified devotees, utilised the amount however for making a golden necklace to the god which they named Eḻunūṟṟuvaṉ after these two bodies.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
—ṉ kaḻañcey muṉṟu mañcāṭiyuṅ kuṉṟiyum vaḷaiyil Oṉṟiṉāl poṉ nāṟkaḻañcum poṟpū Oṉṟu poṉ kaḻañceykālum viy ceyta poṉ Irupattu Irukaḻañcey Eṭṭu mañcāṭiyuṅ kuṉṟiyum meṟpaṭi śrīkāryamārāykiṉṟa Iṅkaṇāṭṭuppallavaraiyar tāmey tirumeṉiy Aṭṭuvitta tiruviṭaimarutil Āṭalviṭaṅkatevarkku Āparaṇañ
ceytum tiruviṭaimarutil tirunāraṇacceri mācāttanūrāṉa tiruppātāḷa kavaṟaiceṭṭiy tirunāvukkaraiyaṉ kuḷaṅkalla Eṉṟu naṭantu paṇṭārattu vaiycca poṉ 5 mālaikku Uṭalāka koṇṭu tiraimur sabhaiyār 3 100- varum nakarattār 4 100- varumāy 7 100- vaṉ Eṉṟu mālaiy per Iṭṭu Ip poṉṉukku talaimāṟu Ivar kaḷum bhattajanaṅkaḷum kuḷaṅkalliṉa talaimāṟu Ippoṉnu
bhakta janaṅkaḷ ciṟpu Iṭṭu Eṟiṉa ciṟpu nūṟṟuaympattu Eḻum Immālaiyil Eṟiṉa kallukku Iṭṭa kācu Āṟum mālaiy ceyta Iru muṭi coḻapperuntaṭṭānukkum kaṇṇiyāṉa poṟkoyil perun taṭṭānukkumāka Iṭṭa kācu Eḻum Āka kācu patiṉmūṉṟinukku Uṭal tiruviṭaimarutuṭaiyār paṇṭārattuk koṇṭa kācu 5- m bhakta janaṅkaḷ ciṟpu Iṭṭa kācu 8- m Immālaiy ceyta meṟpaṭi taṭ ṭārkkey tiruviṭaimarutuṭaiyār paṇṭārattuk kuṭutta nellu ttumukkalam 3 Immālai ceytatu Itu panmāheśvararakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 23.212 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
